deploymentName.label: Deployment name

searchElementTemplates.internalTemplatesTip: Display templates that are executed directly inside the CIB seven engine. These are Java-based implementations that run synchronously within the same application. Suitable for lightweight cases.
searchElementTemplates.externalTemplatesTip: Display templates handled by external workers. These tasks are decoupled from the engine and processed asynchronously by remote services. Preferred for heavy operations.
